name: Raji Rab
background: Aviator, educator, entrepreneur. Owned and operated an airline. Mentored students and served civil rights.
statement: California faces 20B deficit, affordability crisis. Solution is additional revenue, space age advancement not reversing back to basics. I'm the only candidate with Now Plan bringing billions in global investment, balance budget, surplus for all departments, manufacture low-cost meds and multifamily housing, ease regulations, lower taxes, universal healthcare, 1.5 million jobs in first year. I'm an aviator, educator, entrepreneur, owned operated airline, mentored students, served civil rights, support immigration Amnesty.

positions.economy: Bring billions in global investment; 1.5 million jobs in first year; balance budget with surplus; lower taxes; ease regulations
positions.fiscalResponsibility: Address $20B deficit with additional revenue, not cuts
